Molecular Sieve 4A

Adsorbents • Molecular Sieves

Adsorbents

Molecular Sieve 4A

A general-purpose adsorbent for dehydration and removal of polar contaminants in gas and liquid systems.

Download DatasheetRequest TDS / CoA / Quote
Applications
Natural gas drying, air dehydration, oxygen PSA, insulation air
Typical Specifications
Aperture 4Å; strong adsorption capacity; stable bead structure
Grades / Forms
Beads, pellets
Technical Notes
Commonly selected where moisture removal and selective adsorption are needed without heavy chemical exposure.
Documentation
CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
